commands.review_summary:
The PR moves runtime state from JSON/JSONL/sidecar stores into global and per-agent SQLite stores across core runtime, plugins, native apps, docs, tests, and package metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. The destructive upgrade paths are visible in the PR head by following malformed legacy-file reads into SQLite writes and unconditional source deletion; I did not run a mutable existing-user upgrade scenario in this read-only review.
